text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Accountable Care Organizations (ACO) 
Pioneer version 2 (V2) Codebook segment research files. We have included several ways for users to quickly find the 
information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS variable
